column3: ['The CAA officer logs into the system as a user with appropriate permissions to access findings/observations. ', 'The CAA officer reviews the notification of finding or observation received. ', 'The CAA officer initiates an investigation into the finding or observation. ', 'The CAA officer communicates with the entity approval holder regarding the findings/observations. ', 'The CAA officer takes corrective action to address the finding or observation, as necessary. ', 'The CAA officer marks the oversight report and associated findings/observations as closed in the system. ']
column4: ['The CAA officer is successfully logged in. ', 'The CAA officer has read and understood the details of the finding or observation. ', 'An investigation is started for the specific finding or observation. ', 'Communication has been established between the CAA officer and the entity approval holder about the findings/observations. ', 'Corrective actions have been taken for the specific finding or observation. ', 'The oversight report and associated findings/observations are now marked as closed in the system. ']
